---
title: "Research"
format: html
---
 
## Journal Articles
Laura Moritz, **Riccardo Spada**, Jens Rommel, Tobias Dalhaus, Simone Cerroni <br>
**Risk preferences and other (ignored) behavioral factors in fertilizer management decisions: A systematic literature review**, *Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics*, Volume 121, 2026, 102524, [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socec.2026.102524](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socec.2026.102524)
